name: job104-mcp
description: Search 104 (Taiwan) job listings with natural-language filters.
long_description:
# job104-mcp

> Disclaimer: This is an unofficial, educational/personal-use tool. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by 104 Corporation. It calls 104's public web endpoints; please respect 104's Terms of Service and use it at a reasonable, low frequency.

Gives Claude natural-language search over 104 人力銀行 job listings. Provide Chinese area/job-category names (e.g. 台北市大安區, 軟體工程師) and the server resolves them to 104 codes automatically. No API key or login required.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search 104 job listings by keyword, area, job category, salary floor, remote, recency, experience, education, with sorting and paging.

tools.name: get_job_detail
tools.description: Get the full posting (description, requirements, salary, location) for a detail_id from search_jobs.

tools.name: lookup_code
tools.description: Resolve a 104 job-category or area name to its code.
